title: Config 3: adamw width=256 depth=2 batch=64 aug=affine
methodology: Generated a 2-hidden-layer MLP with width 256, batch size 64, adamw at lr=0.001, dropout=0.3, weight_decay=0.0, augmentation=affine, and label_smoothing=0.02.
motivation: Brief insight: ## Research Brief: Tiny MNIST Classifier (tiny-mnist). Building on exp-002-baseline-2-layer-mlp with a focused hyperparameter/architecture change.
